name: golang-golang-x-tools-dev
title: golang-golang-x-tools-dev
description:
supplementary Go tools (development files)
This subrepository holds the source for various packages and tools that
support the Go programming language.
.
Some of the tools, godoc and vet for example, used to be included in the
golang-go package. Others, including the Go oracle and the test coverage tool,
can be fetched with "go get".
.
Packages include a type-checker for Go and an implementation of the Static
Single Assignment form (SSA) representation for Go programs.
.
This package contains the development files.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-golang-x-tools-dev because supplementary Go tools (development files).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-golang-x-tools-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-golang-x-tools-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-golang-x-tools-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
